precondition: panel has been hard power-cycled or otherwise recovered from the current connect/sendme silent state

recommended_order.label: Top-level orchestrator: check serial health, retry official recovery when needed, then run the seed-side runtime limitation chain
If the orchestrator reaches the seed-side runner, inspect the runner summary for the D/?/A classification
If the orchestrator still ends in transport silence, inspect the captured recovery summary instead of re-running ad hoc byte patching

notes: The top-level orchestrator is now the highest-value next live entrypoint because it preserves COM36 serialization and records whether transport recovered before attempting the seed-side runner.
The text-select control is the strongest seed-side control sample, file-stream is second, and file-browser is the target falsification sample.
